sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28991" key="duse/rgeia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσέργ-εια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n28991.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">difficulty</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:53" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.53</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:18:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.18.14</biblScope> </bibl>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">functional defect</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.42</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
